---
title: "Secondary Tasks Analysis"
output: html_document
author:
  - "John Kafumbe"
  - "Jeffrey Olsen"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(readxl)
library(tidyverse)
library(dplyr)
```

## `ST_*` alignment

```{r Get ST columns}
output <- read_excel("./data/output_IIHS_withDMS.xls")
output <- output %>% rename("ST_Right_N" = "ST_Rights_N")
output <- output %>% select(matches("ST_(Right|Left).*") | "DaqName")
output$DaqName <- output$DaqName %>% str_sub(0, -5)
```

```{r Read in DMS data}
non_aug <- read.csv("./data/non_aug_data.csv")
```
